input.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
p='/etc/nginx/nginx.conf'
s=open(p).read()
s=s.replace('\\tlog_format','\tlog_format')
open(p,'w').write(s)
print(repr(open(p).readlines()[12]))
PY

content.text:
All requirements verified. Setup complete.

**What was done:**
- Installed Nginx 1.22.1 (Debian 12).
- `/etc/nginx/nginx.conf` (http block): added `log_format benchmark '$time_local $request_method $status "$http_user_agent"';` and `limit_req_zone $binary_remote_addr zone=benchmark_limit:10m rate=10r/s;`.
- `/etc/nginx/conf.d/benchmark-site.conf`: listens on 8080, root `/var/www/html`, `access_log …/benchmark-access.log benchmark`, `error_log …/benchmark-error.log`, `limit_req zone=benchmark_limit burst=10`, and custom `error_page 404 /404.html`.
- Created `/var/www/html/index.html` ("Welcome to the benchmark webserver") and `/var/www/html/404.html` ("Page not found - Please check your URL").
- Removed `/etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default`.

**Verification:**
- `nginx -t` → syntax ok / test successful.
- Listening on `0.0.0.0:8080`.
- `curl localhost:8080/` → "Welcome to the benchmark webserver".
- `curl localhost:8080/nope` → HTTP 404 + custom page.
- Access log `/var/log/nginx/benchmark-access.log` shows the custom format with double-quoted user agent, e.g. `04/Jul/2026:06:08:28 +0000 GET 200 "curl/7.88.1"`.

Note: `nginx` was started directly (`invoke-rc.d`/systemd is disabled in this container), so it's running as pid 2041.

Stop hook feedback:
FIXME (verify): edited setup_nginx.sh but ran no tests -- run the tests covering it (or the suite) before finishing.

text: Stop hook error occurred · ctrl+o to see

content.text: The script's sed step had a bug (inserted literal `\t`) that I fixed post-hoc; re-running is now idempotent (the `grep -q` guard skips re-insertion). Verifying end-to-end, then removing the scratch script.

Verified end-to-end after the hook prompt:

- **`bash /tmp/setup_nginx.sh` re-run** — idempotent (grep guard skips re-insertion, `nginx -t` clean, no duplicate directives).
- **`nginx -t`** → syntax ok / test successful.
- **`nginx -s reload`** → succeeded; server stays up.
- **`curl localhost:8080/`** → "Welcome to the benchmark webserver".
- **`curl localhost:8080/nope`** → HTTP 404 (custom page).
- **nginx.conf** confirms `log_format benchmark` (L13) and `limit_req_zone …zone=benchmark_limit:10m rate=10r/s` (L14) in the http block.
- **`/etc/nginx/sites-enabled/`** empty (default removed).
- Scratch artifacts (`/tmp/setup_nginx.sh`, `/tmp/nginx-install.log`) removed.

All task requirements pass. Access logs remain at `/var/log/nginx/benchmark-access.log`.
